load.__returns: Returns the corresponding Lua table or a nil value in case of error.
load.__example:
local ini = require "ini"

-- Load the old but still alive Windows "system.ini" file
local system = ini.load(sys.env.windir.."/system.ini")

-- prints the content of the 'wave' key in the section 'drivers'
print(system.drivers.wave)

__params.__description: A File object or a filename string, representing the file whose content will be decoded from ini.

load.__description: Load and decode a file containing ini data, following those rules :
load.__tinydesc: Load and decode an ini file

decode.__returns: Returns the corresponding Lua table or a nil value in case of error.
decode.__example:
local ini = require "ini"

-- sample ini string, that contains two sections of key/value fields
content = [[
[John]
age=32
gender=male
  
[Lena]
age=26
gender=female
]]

local users = ini.decode(content)

-- prints the age of the user John
print(users.John.age)
decode.__description: Decode an ini string to a Lua table, following those rules :
decode.__tinydesc: Generate a Lua table from a ini string

save.__returns: Returns true or false in case of error.

__params.__description: A File object or a filename string, representing the file to save the ini data.

The table to be encoded to ini format and saved to the file. The table must follow the following rules :
  • The table must contain only string keys, each with an associated sub-table
  • Each sub-table must contain only pairs of string keys and string or number values

save.__description: Encode a Lua table to ini format and save it to a file.
save.__tinydesc: Encode a Lua table to a ini representation string and save it to a file

encode.__returns: Returns the encoded ini string or a nil value in case of error.

__params.__description:
The table to be encoded to ini format. The table must follow the following rules :
  • The table must contain only string keys, each with an associated sub-table
  • In each of those sub-tables, the key/pair values will be converted to string

encode.__description: Encode a Lua table in a ini representation string.
encode.__tinydesc: Encode a Lua table to a ini representation string

__description: The ini module allows for the parsing and manipulation of INI files
__tinydesc: Parses and generates INI configuration files for easy settings management
